title: 道路法
bodyExcerpt: {"LawTypeName":"法律","LawNo":"昭和二十七年法律第百八十号","LawName":"道路法","LawNameKana":"どうろほう","OldLawName":"","PromulgationDate":19520610,"AmendName":"下水道法等の一部を改正する法律","AmendNo":"令和八年法律第六十五号","AmendPromulgationDate":20260723,"EnforcementDate":"","EnforcementComment":"公布の日から起算して六月を超えない範囲内において政令で定める日","LawId":"327AC1000000180","LawUrl":"https://elaws.e-gov.go.jp/document?lawid=327AC1000000180_20270122_508AC0000000065","EnforcementFlg":0,"AuthFlg":0}
